case_title: OMI OF CALIFORNIA VS MOSS, JOEY S.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $781.21 FILED BY OMI OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, JOEY S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-18-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSS, JOEY S. HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OMI OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSS, JOEY S. $781.21 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $846.21, AND PAYABLE ON THE 1ST AND 15TH ($75.00) OF EACH MONTH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, JOEY S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OMI OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSS, JOEY S. $781.21 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $781.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-17-1993, GRANTED
